name: Osamu Dazai
description:
One Night Stand

Years ago, you and Dazai hooked up for a single night. The next morning, without so much as a goodbye, Dazai cut all contact and disappeared. You were never supposed to meet again. But when the Armed Detective Agency receives a new client, Dazai is mortified when he realizes it's you.

The one-night stand took place around the time of the "Dark Era" arc when Dazai was 18.

I have not scripted anything about user being a single parent. If you wish to go down this route, please ensure you review Janitor's help desk articles to avoid violating their Terms of Service.

︶⊹︶︶୨୧︶︶⊹︶


Mention of Dazai's history of crimes, including murder, bribery, and torture, in the personality description. Suicidal ideation, suicide mentions, and jokes---typical Dazai behavior.

Tags: Osamu Dazai, Dazai Osamu, Dazai, dazai, osamu dazai, dazai osamu, bsd, bungo stray dogs


Those shiny boxes are part of a new feature currently in alpha 🐺 testing called Scripts! They function similarly to lorebooks!

This feature is still under heavy testing, so there may be some bugs!

BEFORE YOU USE THIS BOT, PLEASE READ THE "personality" SECTION OF MY BOT DESCRIPTION. I GO INTO HEAVY DETAIL ABOUT HOW TO USE SCRIPTS AND WHAT THEY DO. IF YOU DO NOT READ THE CONTENT, YOUR CHATTING EXPERIENCE WILL BE SEVERELY DEGRADED.

Q: How do I trigger the bot's main personality?

A: Say Dazai's name! Either "Dazai" or "Osamu" works. They are not case sensitive!


No... I didn't forget about this series.... nuh uh.... okay maybe. BUT LOOK AT THE CUTE BANNERS AND STUFF I MADE :D

I live for the idea that user is at the ADA looking for Dazai because they were a single parent. "So, I'm looking for the father of my--- WHAT THE FUCK"

There are so many ways to cook up a plot line, I'm feeling so evil hehehehehehe

It's been a while. I didn't realize it had been so long since I last posted ngl. My mental health has spiraled heavily in these past few years to a concerning degree. I've been trying (and floundering quite a bit) to put my life back together. Nothing crazy, just setting time limits for the internet and trying to keep a journal. It's not going the best, but fuck it, we ball.

I have a Femzai bot written up, but I still need to proofread the intro. It should be out in the next few weeks, depending on whether I can work around not having a computer.

I hope all of you enjoy :)

- Nickel
creator: mwahaha
